name: 德西蕾·普罗克特
name_full: 德西蕾·普罗克特 Desiree Proctor
introduction: Desirée Proctor is a writer whose television work includes Lopez vs Lopez (NBC), Just Roll With It (Disney Channel), and Betch: A Sketch Show (Hulu). She has also worked on video games such as Aliens: Rogue Incursion (Survios), Walking Dead: A New Frontier, and Walking Dead: Michonne (Telltale Games). Desirée was selected out of 1,500 entries to participate in the DC Comics Writers Workshop.
